def build_report(data: list[dict]) -> str:
    lines = [f"Name: {row['name']}, Value: {row['value']}" for row in data]
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"


def generate_csv(rows: list[list[str]]) -> str:
    lines = [",".join(row) for row in rows]
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"


def format_messages(messages: list[dict]) -> str:
    parts = []
    for msg in messages:
        line = f"[{msg['level']}] {msg['text']}"
        if msg.get("details"):
            line += f" - {msg['details']}"
        parts.append(line)
    return "\n".join(parts) + "\n"


def build_html_list(items: list[str]) -> str:
    html = "".join(f"<li>{item}</li>" for item in items)
    return f"<ul>{html}</ul>"
